title: Create Security & Rockets
description: A massive engineering and space adventure modpack. Build complex factories with Create, travel to distant planets with Ad Astra, and secure your world with Security Craft.
body:
**Welcome to Create Security & Rockets!**

This modpack offers a massive variety of content for players who love creativity, technical engineering, and grand adventures. We have carefully curated a selection of mods that allow you to build, explore, and defend like never before.

## Core Features

* **Advanced Engineering:** Use the **Create** mod to design complex machinery, automated production lines, and impressive mechanical builds.
* **Space Exploration:** With **Ad Astra**, you can build your own rockets and catapult yourself into the stars to explore new planets and frontiers.
* **Ultimate Protection:** Use **Security Craft** to guard your base with cameras, turrets, and high-tech locking systems to keep your progress safe.
* **Adventure & Variety:** Beyond tech, this pack includes numerous mods that enhance exploration and provide endless hours of fun for every playstyle.

## Intellectual Property & Credits

Please note: I am the curator who assembled this collection for a unique gameplay experience. However, all included mods remain the **intellectual property of their respective creators**. I do not claim ownership of the individual mods.

---

**Deutsch (German):**

Mein riesiges Minecraft-Modpack bringt dir die volle Bandbreite an Kreativität und Abenteuer: Mit Create baust du komplexe Maschinen und Fabriken, Rockets katapultieren dich ins All, Security schützt deine Welten, und dazu gibt es viele weitere spannende Mods für kreative Projekte und stundenlangen Spielspaß.

**Hinweis zum Urheberrecht:** Dieses Modpack wurde von mir zusammengestellt, die enthaltenen Mods sind jedoch weiterhin das geistige Eigentum der jeweiligen Ersteller.
